response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced hands-on engineer with over 30 years of broad technical breadth, but he falls significantly short of the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) profile. The role demands a director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI product leadership, and the ability to advise strategic customers and shape cloud/AI platform direction. His AI exposure is limited to a brief mention of MCP tooling in his current role, with no evidence of deep AI/ML expertise, published research, or AI product ownership at scale. His cloud experience is similarly thin (a single AWS CDK mention), and there is no indication of executive-level influence, strategic customer advisory work, or thought leadership in AI beyond community workshops from the early 2000s.
strengths: 30+ years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains — far exceeds the 15-year minimum
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and open-source founder experience (GISCollective, CMSushi, multiple D-lang libraries) aligned with the preferred startup-within-larger-org profile
Active knowledge-sharing history through workshops and conference talks, showing some capacity to inspire and educate technical communities
concerns: AI expertise is superficial and recent — limited to a one-line mention of MCP code generators; no demonstrated AI product, platform, or research output at the level the role requires
No cloud platform depth — AWS CDK appears once; no evidence of GCP, Azure, or cloud architecture strategy experience expected at Principal/Director level
Current and historical titles are Senior/Staff Software Developer, with no evidence of director-level scope, strategic customer advisory, or cross-org technical leadership
